title: Arctic Domain Awareness Real-Data Pilot

researchScope.description: Small public-source pilot for Arctic domain awareness, underwater ISR, autonomous patrol, and edge mission software. This batch is reviewable candidate data only and is not approved seed data.

guardrailNotes: Public-source alignment only; this batch does not imply classified CAF, DND, NORAD, NATO, or procurement targeting.
Company and capability records use canonical public URLs and paraphrased evidence snippets.
Candidate records are intentionally staged outside supabase/seed until a human reviewer approves import.

companies.name: Kraken Robotics
companies.overview: Canadian subsea technology company with synthetic aperture sonar, underwater imaging, subsea power, and robotic systems relevant to underwater awareness and autonomous maritime operations.
companies.headquarters: St. John's Newfoundland and Labrador Canada
companies.market_context: Useful candidate for underwater ISR and Arctic maritime awareness where high-resolution seabed or subsea detection data supports operator decisions.
companies.research_rationale: Official product and company release pages describe synthetic aperture sonar and subsea systems with defence and maritime security relevance.

companies.name: MDA Space
companies.overview: Canadian space and mission systems company with Earth observation, radar, space robotics, satellite operations, and maritime awareness capabilities.
companies.market_context: Relevant to Arctic domain awareness where persistent all-weather overhead observation and maritime monitoring support sparse northern coverage.
companies.research_rationale: Official MDA pages and public contract reporting support the Earth observation and maritime awareness connection.

companies.name: Cellula Robotics
companies.overview: Canadian underwater robotics company developing long-endurance autonomous underwater vehicles and related subsea autonomy systems.
companies.market_context: Relevant to underwater ISR and autonomous patrol where endurance and autonomous subsea operation are mission constraints.
companies.research_rationale: Official product pages support long-endurance AUV capability, but mission fit still needs operator validation.

companies.name: Kongsberg Geospatial
companies.overview: Ottawa-based geospatial software company providing airspace visualization, unmanned systems awareness, and mission display software for complex operations.
companies.market_context: Relevant to autonomous patrol and edge data processing where operators need fused situational awareness for uncrewed systems and degraded-connectivity missions.
companies.research_rationale: Official product pages describe IRIS Terminal and related unmanned systems visualization functions.

companies.name: GeoSpectrum Technologies
companies.overview: Nova Scotia underwater acoustics company offering sonar, acoustic sensors, and defence surveillance systems for surface and subsea applications.
companies.market_context: Relevant to underwater ISR and maritime surveillance where compact active-passive sonar can support ships, ships of opportunity, and uncrewed surface platforms.
companies.research_rationale: Official GeoSpectrum TRAPS page describes active-passive sonar capability for defence and surveillance use.

companies.name: Open Ocean Robotics
companies.overview: Canadian marine robotics company developing autonomous uncrewed surface vehicles and maritime data services for persistent ocean monitoring.
companies.market_context: Relevant to maritime domain awareness where persistent uncrewed surface collection can extend coverage without staffed vessels.
companies.research_rationale: Official company pages and industry reporting support maritime awareness relevance, but operational maturity should be validated before procurement-facing treatment.

capabilities.name: KATFISH Towed Synthetic Aperture Sonar
capabilities.summary: Actively stabilized towed synthetic aperture sonar system for high-resolution underwater survey, seabed imaging, and subsea object detection.
capabilities.company_facing_context: Best reviewed for underwater ISR, route survey, seabed change detection, and mine or subsea infrastructure awareness use cases.
capabilities.research_rationale: Official product documentation describes resolution, area coverage, and real-time SAS data characteristics.

capabilities.name: MDA CHORUS Synthetic Aperture Radar Constellation
capabilities.summary: Next-generation C-band and X-band synthetic aperture radar constellation intended to provide all-weather day-night Earth observation data.
capabilities.company_facing_context: Best reviewed as an overhead sensing layer for Arctic awareness, maritime monitoring, and distributed sensor fusion.
capabilities.research_rationale: Official CHORUS page describes the SAR constellation design and public reporting connects MDA services to maritime awareness.

capabilities.name: Envoy Long-Endurance Autonomous Underwater Vehicle
capabilities.summary: Long-endurance fuel-cell autonomous underwater vehicle designed for persistent subsea missions and extended underwater operation.
capabilities.company_facing_context: Best reviewed for undersea route reconnaissance, subsea infrastructure monitoring, and extended underwater patrol validation.
capabilities.research_rationale: Official product page supports endurance and AUV framing, while defence mission suitability still needs validation evidence.

capabilities.name: IRIS Terminal Airspace Visualization
capabilities.summary: Airspace visualization and situational awareness software that combines sensor, telemetry, and air traffic inputs for uncrewed operations.
capabilities.company_facing_context: Best reviewed for uncrewed system deconfliction, BVLOS test ranges, and local mission visualization in complex operations.
capabilities.research_rationale: Official product page describes sensor and telemetry fusion for airspace management and unmanned operations.

capabilities.name: TRAPS Towed Reelable Active Passive Sonar
capabilities.summary: Compact active-passive variable-depth sonar system for underwater target detection, classification, tracking, and localization.
capabilities.company_facing_context: Best reviewed for surface-ship and uncrewed-surface underwater surveillance roles in maritime approaches.
capabilities.research_rationale: Official TRAPS page describes active-passive sonar functions and platform applicability.

capabilities.name: Autonomous USV Maritime Awareness Platform
capabilities.summary: Autonomous uncrewed surface vessel platform for persistent maritime security, ocean data collection, and remote maritime awareness.
capabilities.company_facing_context: Best reviewed as a persistent surface collection node that can complement overhead, acoustic, and mission software layers.
capabilities.research_rationale: Official and industry sources support maritime awareness relevance, but defence operating fit should remain validation-led.

capabilityUseCases.action_note: Assess where high-resolution towed SAS can support undersea awareness or seabed survey needs without implying a specific procurement target.
capabilityUseCases.why_it_matters: High-resolution towed SAS can help operators characterize underwater areas where persistent undersea awareness and seabed context are operationally valuable.
capabilityUseCases.research_rationale: Product evidence and recent order evidence make this a strong candidate for review in underwater ISR.

capabilityUseCases.action_note: Validate Arctic operating assumptions before treating towed SAS as a northern awareness solution.
capabilityUseCases.why_it_matters: The capability could support Arctic maritime awareness where undersea survey and detection gaps need source-backed validation in northern conditions.
capabilityUseCases.research_rationale: Technology fit is strong, but Arctic-specific employment should stay validation-led until field evidence is added.

capabilityUseCases.action_note: Review as an overhead sensing layer for fusion with maritime, acoustic, and local operator data.
capabilityUseCases.why_it_matters: All-weather SAR observation can strengthen Arctic awareness by adding persistent overhead context where weather and distance limit other collection methods.
capabilityUseCases.research_rationale: Official SAR constellation evidence and public maritime awareness contract context make this a strong Arctic awareness candidate.

capabilityUseCases.action_note: Validate endurance, communications, recovery, and payload integration assumptions with relevant underwater operators.
capabilityUseCases.why_it_matters: A long-endurance AUV can extend underwater survey and patrol reach, but mission value depends on validated payloads, recovery concepts, and operating conditions.
capabilityUseCases.research_rationale: The AUV evidence is credible, but defence relevance should remain medium until more mission-specific evidence is collected.

capabilityUseCases.action_note: Evaluate as a test-range or field-trial visualization layer for uncrewed patrol operations.
capabilityUseCases.why_it_matters: Autonomous patrol trials need reliable local awareness and deconfliction, especially when multiple telemetry and sensor feeds must be interpreted together.
capabilityUseCases.research_rationale: Official product evidence clearly supports uncrewed system visualization and BVLOS awareness.

capabilityUseCases.action_note: Review as a mission display layer that could complement edge fusion rather than replace broader C2 integration.
capabilityUseCases.why_it_matters: A common visualization layer can reduce operator burden when telemetry, sensor, and airspace context would otherwise be split across separate tools.
capabilityUseCases.research_rationale: Fit to edge data processing is plausible but should be reviewed as an integration support capability, not a full data platform.

capabilityUseCases.action_note: Assess platform fit for ships of opportunity, patrol vessels, or uncrewed surface platforms.
capabilityUseCases.why_it_matters: Compact active-passive sonar can add underwater target detection and tracking to platforms that need persistent awareness without large dedicated sonar suites.
capabilityUseCases.research_rationale: Official TRAPS evidence directly supports underwater surveillance and target localization.

capabilityUseCases.action_note: Validate endurance, payload, communications, and cold-weather operating assumptions before elevating to a top Arctic target.
capabilityUseCases.why_it_matters: Persistent uncrewed surface collection could extend maritime awareness in sparse regions, but Arctic-specific reliability and payload integration need validation.
capabilityUseCases.research_rationale: The maritime awareness fit is source-backed, while Arctic operating realism remains a validation question.

signals.title: Synthetic aperture sonar and subsea battery orders announced
signals.description: Kraken announced purchase orders covering synthetic aperture sonar products and subsea batteries, including defence and commercial customers.

sources.title: Kraken Robotics Announces Orders For Synthetic Aperture Sonar And Subsea Batteries
Government Of Canada Extends MDA Space Contract Providing Continuous Space-Based Maritime Awareness And Security
TRAPS Towed Reelable Active Passive Sonar
GSTS And Open Ocean Robotics Unveil NextGen Autonomous Maritime Security System

evidenceSnippets.excerpt: Kraken describes itself as a Canadian subsea intelligence company with sonar, underwater imaging, subsea power, and robotic systems.
The KATFISH product page describes an actively stabilized towed synthetic aperture sonar system for high-resolution underwater data collection.
Kraken reported purchase orders for synthetic aperture sonar and subsea battery products from defence and commercial customers.
MDA Space presents Earth observation and radar satellite capability as part of its space mission systems portfolio.
MDA CHORUS is described as a next-generation Earth observation constellation using C-band and X-band synthetic aperture radar.
Public contract reporting connects MDA Space services and future CHORUS data use to continuous space-based maritime awareness.
Cellula Robotics presents underwater robotic vehicle capability through its Envoy autonomous underwater vehicle product page.
The Envoy AUV page describes a long-endurance underwater vehicle powered by a fuel cell for extended subsea operation.
Kongsberg Geospatial positions IRIS Terminal around airspace visualization and support for unmanned systems operations.
IRIS Terminal is described as software combining sensor, feed, and telemetry inputs for professional drone and airspace managers.
GeoSpectrum presents underwater acoustic and sonar products for defence and surveillance surface system applications.
TRAPS is described as an active-passive sonar system for detection, classification, tracking, and localization of underwater targets.
Open Ocean Robotics describes autonomous uncrewed surface vehicles for maritime security and ocean data collection.
The company frames its uncrewed vessels as persistent autonomous platforms for ocean monitoring and maritime awareness.
Industry reporting describes Open Ocean Robotics involvement in an autonomous maritime security system demonstration with GSTS.
